title: Tanya clean-tree build check
description: Schema for .tanya/clean-tree-build.json. Opt-in: after a run commits, Tanya checks out HEAD into a throwaway git worktree and runs `command` there. If it fails, the run is blocked — this catches a committed file that references an untracked one (green in the dirty worktree, broken from a clean checkout).

command.description: Build/compile command run in the clean HEAD worktree via `bash -lc`. e.g. "swift build", "go build ./...", "npm ci && npm run build".

trigger.description: Optional glob (supports * and **). When set, the check only runs if a changed file matches. e.g. "**/*.swift". Omit to run on every commit.
